title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TNT India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TNT India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TNT India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
